content.full_text:
130 Linden Lane # 118
Mill Valley, CA 94941
April 30, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J St. # 800
Sacramento, CA 95815

Dear Sir/Madam;

I would like you to inform me as to California state law concerning the U.S. Constitutional right to petition on or near public thoroughfares and walkways as well as parking lots surrounding a business, in particular with respect to a large grocery chain store such as Safeway located in Mill Valley, CA.

I would appreciate it if you would delineate sections of the law forbidding discrimination and harassment against political party, preference, or opinion in addition to other provisions of the law prohibiting discrimination against race, creed, sex, etc.

Thank you very much.

Sincerely,

Julie Anne Sajewski
